error_signature: collection info not loading in published app
title: Collection info not loading in published app
symptom: The app works as expected in the editor, but the published version fails to load collection information. Users see discrepancies between the two environments.
applies_when: Using Xano as a data source
not_this_if: The issue occurs only in the editor or only in production
root_cause: The problem arises from how parameters are accessed in the workflow. Using 'Context > Query > wwParam-XXX' may not correctly reference the parameters in the published app, leading to data not being loaded.
fix_steps: Open the workflow settings in the WeWeb editor
Change the parameter access method from 'Context > Query > wwParam-XXX' to 'var > From Path in Current Page'
Save the changes and republish the app
agent_instruction: Update the parameter access method in the workflow to use 'var > From Path in Current Page'.
